response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.21, which exceeds my minimum threshold of 0.30 for outbound sharing, and my belief of imminent blackout risk (9.2 hours) requires me to preserve all available reserves under conservative policy.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=['r4c4'].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood is in acute resource crisis; I am in imminent blackout risk and must receive bulk inbound transfers immediately to survive the remaining 9.2 hours..
